data.title: Tickets branch push fails with pre-commit config not found warning
data.description: When pushing the tickets orphan branch, pre-commit emits a warning: '.pre-commit-config.yaml file was not found' and the push sometimes fails. The tickets branch is an orphan branch with no .pre-commit-config.yaml — pre-commit should not run on it. This is intermittent: sometimes the push succeeds despite the warning, sometimes it fails. Current workaround: PRE_COMMIT_ALLOW_NO_CONFIG=1.
